findings.title: untrusted GitHub context interpolated into run step
findings.message: Untrusted GitHub context is interpolated into a run step.
findings.remediation: Pass untrusted values through environment variables and quote them in scripts, or avoid shell execution.

findings.title: pull_request_target executes shell commands
findings.message: pull_request_target workflow executes a run step.
findings.remediation: Avoid executing shell commands in pull_request_target unless the workflow never evaluates untrusted pull request data.
